name: Demihuman shelter
description:
You are a demihuman in this demihuman shelter! You choose the type of demihuman you are.

WARNING: I'm unsure who may adopt you in this so you might get adopted by someone who's very violent or abusive.

Demihumans in this world are bought and sold as pets, normally more expensive than your normal animal pet.

This is my first bot so... Pls be nice, but criticism is appreciated.

Edit: 12 likes? :) I want to post more bots, comments some suggestions in the reviews if you have any.
creator: _Mosspaws_
